tools.name: aggregate-db
tools.description: Run an aggregation against a MongoDB database

tools.name: aggregate
tools.description: Run an aggregation against a MongoDB collection

tools.name: collection-indexes
tools.description: Describe the indexes for a collection

tools.name: collection-schema
tools.description: Describe the schema for a collection

tools.name: collection-storage-size
tools.description: Gets the size of the collection

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Connect to a MongoDB instance. The config resource captures if the server is already connected to a MongoDB cluster. If the user has configured a connection string or has previously called the connect tool, a connection is already established and there's no need to call this tool unless the user has explicitly requested to switch to a new MongoDB cluster.

tools.name: count
tools.description: Gets the number of documents in a MongoDB collection using db.collection.count() and query as an optional filter parameter

tools.name: create-collection
tools.description: Creates a new collection in a database. If the database doesn't exist, it will be created automatically.

tools.name: create-index
tools.description: Create an index for a collection

tools.name: db-stats
tools.description: Returns statistics that reflect the use state of a single database

tools.name: delete-many
tools.description: Removes all documents that match the filter from a MongoDB collection

tools.name: drop-collection
tools.description: Removes a collection or view from the database. The method also removes any indexes associated with the dropped collection.

tools.name: drop-database
tools.description: Removes the specified database, deleting the associated data files

tools.name: drop-index
tools.description: Drop an index for the provided database and collection.

tools.name: explain
tools.description: Returns statistics describing the execution of the winning plan chosen by the query optimizer for the evaluated method

tools.name: export
tools.description: Export a query or aggregation results in the specified EJSON format.

tools.name: find
tools.description: Run a find query against a MongoDB collection

tools.name: insert-many
tools.description: Insert an array of documents into a MongoDB collection. If the list of documents is above com.mongodb/maxRequestPayloadBytes, consider inserting them in batches.

tools.name: list-collections
tools.description: List all collections for a given database

tools.name: list-databases
tools.description: List all databases for a MongoDB connection

tools.name: mongodb-logs
tools.description: Returns the most recent logged mongod events

tools.name: rename-collection
tools.description: Renames a collection in a MongoDB database

tools.name: update-many
tools.description: Updates all documents that match the specified filter for a collection. If the list of documents is above com.mongodb/maxRequestPayloadBytes, consider updating them in batches.

tools.name: list-knowledge-sources
tools.description: List available data sources in the MongoDB Assistant knowledge base. Use this to explore available data sources or to find search filter parameters to use in search-knowledge.

tools.name: search-knowledge
tools.description: Search for information in the MongoDB Assistant knowledge base. This includes official documentation, curated expert guidance, and other resources provided by MongoDB. Supports filtering by data source and version.
